form.formComment: Form hard to fault. At the latest run favourite; came from midfield and won by 4 len at Osmangazi All Weather March 23 over 1400m defeating Demirkardesler carrying 59kg at $1.20. The start before that 3rd in a small field at this track on March 6 over 1400m, 3 len behind Ruzgardahan with 59kg at $4.45. Big chance to make it back-to-back successes.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after seven months 3rd of 8 at this track on March 26 over 1600m, 18 len behind Karizmatik with 56.5kg at $3.55.
